title: task.failed v1
description: Explicit failure event for a task, distinct from task.completed with status=failed. Use when failure is detected externally (watchdog, timeout handler, Brain service) rather than by the executing agent.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'task.failed' for this schema.

source.description: Bus identity of the agent or service that detected the failure.

target.description: Bus channel this message is published to. Defaults to 'sos:channel:tasks'.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which this message was emitted.

version.description: Schema version of this message. SemVer — major.minor or major.minor.patch.

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message instance. UUID v4 recommended.

payload.description: Data describing the externally-detected task failure.

task_id.description: Identifier of the task that failed. Alphanumeric, underscores, and dashes only.

failed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the failure was detected.

error.description: Structured error detail for the failure.

code.description: SOS error code in the format SOS-XXXX.

traceback.description: Full stack trace or exception chain as a plain string. Optional.

retryable.description: True if the scheduler may re-queue this task for another attempt.

retry_count.description: Number of previous attempts before this failure, if known.

assigned_to.description: Agent that was assigned the task when the failure occurred, if known.
